title: black-scholes-pricing
brief: A cinematic journey through mountain peaks, flags, hourglasses, storms, rivers, and balance scales — each scene a visual metaphor for one input of the pricing model: stock price as mountain summit, strike price as distant flag target, time as flowing hourglass sand, volatility as shifting weather from calm lake to storm, risk-free rate as steady river current, and theoretical value as a perfectly balanced scale at golden hour.
global_style: Cinematic natural light, warm earth tones, shallow depth of field, slow meditative camera movements

scenes.storyboard_prompt: A mountain peak rising above morning mist, sunlit golden summit, wide landscape, 35mm anamorphic, dramatic natural light from the east, sharp foreground rocks fading into soft misty valley below
scenes.video_prompt: Slow aerial pull-back revealing the full mountain range, morning mist drifting through valleys, golden light expanding across peaks
scenes.motion: mist drifting, light expanding across mountainside
scenes.style: golden hour warmth, high contrast between lit peaks and shadowed valleys
scenes.negative: text, letters, words, writing, numbers, digits, characters, script, subtitles, captions, foreign text, gibberish, watermark

scenes.storyboard_prompt: A single red flag planted on a distant mountain ridge, misty valley between viewer and the flag, long telephoto compression, warm afternoon light, sharp foreground grass blades
scenes.video_prompt: Flag rippling gently in mountain breeze, camera slow push-in through the misty valley toward the distant ridge, depth shifting
scenes.motion: flag rippling in breeze, mist swirling in valley
scenes.style: warm golden light on distant ridge, cool blue mist in mid-ground
scenes.negative: text, letters, words, writing, numbers, digits, characters, script, subtitles, captions, foreign text, gibberish, watermark

scenes.video_prompt: Sand grains flowing steadily through the hourglass neck, soft light shifting as clouds pass outside the window, shadows slowly elongating
scenes.camera: static close-up with gentle rack focus, 85mm
scenes.motion: sand flowing downward, light shifting gradually
scenes.style: warm amber and gold tones, soft natural window light

scenes.camera: low angle static shot near water surface, 35mm wide
scenes.motion: water surface rippling, clouds building and moving, reflection distorting
scenes.style: cool blues for calm water transitioning to stormy purple-grey atmosphere

scenes.camera: downstream tracking shot at water level, 24mm wide
